series_metadata.series_description: Files for each student whose loan(s) were discharged in accordance with federal regulations due to the closure of the school the borrower/student attended. Files contain the OSAC Certification Statement/Application for Loan Discharge, lender claim form (

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for 5 years from date loans are discharged or until dissolution of the Agency, then transfer to the the USDE. If USDE decline transfer, destroy., Paper: Recycle
